steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: Standard deviation is smallest when values cluster most tightly around the mean. Compare the range and spread of each dataset.

steps.title: Compare the spreads
steps.content: All four data sets are centered near $52$, so compare how far the values are from $52$. The correct answer has values $51,52,52,52,53$, which are only $1$, $0$, $0$, $0$, and $1$ away from $52$.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content:
• A ranges from $49$ to $55$, so it is more spread out.
  • B ranges from $50$ to $54$, so it is still more spread out than D.
  • C ranges evenly from $50$ to $54$.
  • D stays between $51$ and $53$, with three values exactly at $52$.
The correct answer is the most tightly clustered, so it has the smallest standard deviation. D is correct.
